name: Hilton Honors American Express Aspire Card
title: Hilton Honors American Express Aspire Card (American Express)
text:
Card: Hilton Honors American Express Aspire Card (American Express)
Best hotel card for Hilton loyalists
Pros: Complimentary Hilton Diamond status with all the associated perks (including lounge access at select properties, complimentary breakfast and room upgrades when available),Annual Free Night Reward (valid at most Hilton properties worldwide),Up to $400 in Hilton resort statement credits each year (up to $200 semi-annually),Up to $200 in airline fee credits annually (up to $50 in statement credits each calendar year),Strong earning rates on Hilton purchases and select travel categories
Cons: High $550 annual fee,Perks are heavily Hilton-focused, making them less valuable if you don’t stay at their properties often
Why we chose it: The Hilton Honors American Express Aspire Card offers unparalleled value for frequent Hilton guests, with automatic top-tier Hilton Diamond status, up to $400 in annual Hilton resort statement credits (up to $200 semi-annually) and a Free Night Reward every year. Its rich suite of benefits easily offsets the annual fee for those who stay at Hilton properties even a few times per year. (Partner offer)
Who it's good for: Frequent Hilton guests who want top-tier elite benefits, high-value travel credits and a Free Night Reward without having to meet elite stay requirements.
Annual fee: $550
Rewards: 3 - 14X points
Intro bonus: Earn 175,000 Hilton Honors Bonus Points after you spend $6,000 on eligible purchases on the Hilton Honors American Express Aspire Card within your first 6 months of Card Membership. Offer Ends 4/15/2026.
Points valuation: 0.5
Limited time: Limited-Time Offer
APR: 29.99% Variable,28.74% Variable,19.49%-28.49% Variable
Transfer partners: This card earns Amex points
Review: https://thepointsguy.com/credit-cards/reviews/hilton-amex-aspire-review/
